payload.answer: The context describes a restricted SQL environment where only SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 is permitted; DELETE operations are denied. No memory cards are returned or modified by this query alone, as it only retrieves IDs without exposing statement content or other fields. Therefore, no durable memory can be committed, and no facts can be inferred or presented as current from this limited output.

entity_resolution.reason: No entities present in context to resolve

details: Context interpreted correctly: SELECT-only mode permits reading IDs but not modifying or deleting data
No memory card statements, entities, or relationships were accessible via the permitted query
No superseded or deleted facts were presented — all output adheres to constraint of not exposing non-current data
Ambiguity preserved: no assumptions made about content of memory cards beyond what is explicitly allowed to be read

repair_options: Request broader SELECT permissions to retrieve statement, kind, confidence, entities, or relationships fields from memory_cards
Use a different tool or interface that allows read access to full memory card contents
Clarify if the intent is to debug why no data is returned despite the SELECT being allowed
